exercises.name: Quiet Feet Footwork Drills
exercises.video_title: Essential Footwork Drills - EVERY climber should be doing this! | Fundamentals Series
exercises.description: Clear progressive footwork drills focused on precision, silent placements, and transferable technique for all grades.

exercises.name: Flagging Technique
exercises.video_title: How to Flag - A Climbing Technique for Achieving Balance
exercises.description: Excellent movement breakdown with on-wall demos showing when and why to flag for balance and body control.

exercises.name: Drop Knee Technique
exercises.video_title: What the Heck is a Drop Knee?
exercises.description: Simple explanation of drop-knee mechanics, positioning, and common errors that make the move feel awkward.

exercises.name: Heel and Toe Hook Technique
exercises.video_title: How to Heel & Toe hook || The two most powerful climbing techniques
exercises.description: Strong demo-focused tutorial covering both heel and toe hooks with practical examples and body-position cues.

exercises.name: Dynamic Climbing and Dynos
exercises.video_title: The cheat code of dynamic climbing #bouldering
exercises.description: Short but useful demo highlighting timing and movement pattern for dynamic climbing rather than just jumping wildly like a goblin.

exercises.name: Body Positioning Fundamentals
exercises.video_title: Your Biggest Climbing Mistakes FIXED - V0-V4
exercises.description: Addresses common beginner body-position mistakes with practical corrections that map well to app coaching cues.

exercises.name: Half Crimp Max Hangs
exercises.video_title: Max Hangs for Finger Strength (How To)
exercises.description: Concise and specific max-hang demo with straightforward protocol explanation; easy to pair with structured plans.

exercises.name: Open Hand Hangs
exercises.video_title: Hangboard Edge Hang - Open Hand
exercises.description: Very clean single-exercise demo showing open-hand position on the edge without unnecessary fluff.

exercises.name: Hangboard Basics and Grip Selection
exercises.video_title: Climbers Guide to Hangboarding
exercises.description: Great starter resource covering setup, grip types, and hangboard structure from a trusted climbing training source.

exercises.name: Hangboard Repeaters
exercises.video_title: Bodyweight Repeaters | Intermediate Hangboard Session | Lattice Training Tutorial #Shorts
exercises.description: Short demo of a classic repeater format that can plug directly into an app-prescribed session.

exercises.name: Grip Types for Half Crimp and Open Hand
exercises.video_title: Hangboard Grip Types w/Louis Parkinson
exercises.description: Useful visual explanation of grip selection and finger positions, especially for distinguishing half crimp vs open hand.

exercises.name: One-Arm Hangs
exercises.video_title: How to ONE ARM HANG on the 10mm! | my finger strength journey
exercises.description: Solid demonstration of one-arm finger strength progression and loading ideas for advanced climbers.

exercises.name: Finger Strength Session with Elite Climber
exercises.video_title: How to get STRONG FINGERS with Alex Megos
exercises.description: Shows real-world high-level finger training with technique cues from an elite climber, useful as inspiration and reference.

exercises.name: Moonboard Basics
exercises.video_title: Introduction to Board Climbing & Training | Moonboard and Woodie System Board
exercises.description: Strong intro to board climbing concepts, movement demands, and how Moonboard-style systems differ from general gym climbing.

exercises.name: Board Climbing Technique
exercises.video_title: Techniques that Make or Break Your Board Climbing
exercises.description: Deep technique-focused breakdown of why board climbing feels different and how to move better on steep standardized boards.

exercises.name: Kilterboard Basics
exercises.video_title: Tommy Caldwell's Ultimate Training Setup // KILTERBOARD
exercises.description: Quick orientation to Kilterboard setup and use, helpful for climbers new to LED board systems.

exercises.name: Board Training Programming
exercises.video_title: How to Write Your Own Training Plan | Plan Writing Series
exercises.description: Not board-only, but excellent for teaching how to structure a board-focused training block inside a broader plan.

exercises.name: Limit Bouldering on Boards
exercises.video_title: Limit Bouldering (How To)
exercises.description: Super concise explanation of limit bouldering that maps directly to hard board sessions and intent-based training.

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-Ups
exercises.video_title: Weighted Pull-ups for Bouldering? | Emil Abrahamsson Tier List
exercises.description: Useful discussion and demonstration of when weighted pull-ups are valuable for climbers and how they fit training priorities.

exercises.name: One-Arm Pull-Up Progression
exercises.video_title: One Arm Pull-up - The Most Important Technique #shorts
exercises.description: Short, technique-centered cueing for one-arm pull-up mechanics; good reference clip for advanced progressions.

exercises.name: Rows for Climbers
exercises.video_title: The PERFECT Pulling Exercise Rock Climbers Always Forget About
exercises.description: Targets neglected pulling patterns and explains why rows matter for shoulder balance and performance.

exercises.name: Push-Up Progression for Climbers
exercises.video_title: Climbers Over-Complicate Pullup Training
exercises.description: Broader pull-up video, but useful as a complement to simple bodyweight pushing and pulling progressions in climber strength plans.

exercises.name: Shoulder Press and Shoulder Stability
exercises.video_title: 3 Essential Shoulder Exercises for Climbers!
exercises.description: Practical shoulder-strengthening drills from an elite climber that support pressing strength and long-term shoulder resilience.

exercises.name: Front Lever Progressions
exercises.video_title: Front Levers For Climbing: 4 Progressions To Get You Stronger
exercises.description: Detailed progression ladder for front lever development and body tension, highly relevant for steep climbing strength.

exercises.name: L-Sit Progression
exercises.video_title: HOW to Do L Sit for BEGINNERS
exercises.description: Simple beginner-friendly L-sit progression demo that can slot neatly into a climber core day.

exercises.name: Ab Wheel Rollouts
exercises.video_title: ab wheel - unsponsored review
exercises.description: Covers ab-wheel use and setup in an accessible way; useful for exercise library inclusion even though it is not climbing-specific.

exercises.name: Deadlift for Climbers
exercises.video_title: I Was Wrong About Deadlifting (Why and How Climbers Should Do It)
exercises.description: Good rationale plus movement discussion for including deadlifts in climber programs without turning every session into powerlifting cosplay.

exercises.name: Cossack Squat Mobility Strength
exercises.video_title: How to do Cossack Squats (3 Mistakes!)
exercises.description: Great coaching cues for a squat variation that improves hip mobility and leg strength useful for high steps and wide positions.

exercises.name: Reverse Wrist Curls
exercises.video_title: Dumbbell Reverse Wrist Curl Demo
exercises.description: Straightforward demonstration of a key forearm antagonist exercise for elbow health and balanced arm training.

exercises.name: External Rotation
exercises.video_title: External Rotations (How To)
exercises.description: Clean quick demo of a staple rotator cuff movement that belongs in almost every climber prehab library.

exercises.name: ARC Training Basics
exercises.video_title: ARCing for Beginners
exercises.description: Directly relevant primer on ARC training with simple guidance for intensity and duration.

exercises.name: Running for Climbers
exercises.video_title: Does Running Help or Hurt Climbing // Jonathan Siegrist
exercises.description: Thoughtful discussion of where running fits for climbers, helpful for contextualizing cardio inside training plans.

exercises.name: Jump Rope Conditioning
exercises.video_title: JUMP ROPE LIKE A PRO IN 2 MINUTES l LEARN HOW TO SKIP
exercises.description: Fast, clear jump-rope technique demo that works well for warm-ups or short conditioning blocks.

exercises.name: Aerobic Endurance Intervals
exercises.video_title: This improved my endurance by 13%!
exercises.description: Short demonstration of endurance-focused training ideas that can supplement ARC or circuit-style conditioning.

exercises.name: Hip Mobility for High Steps
exercises.video_title: Unlock Your Climbing Potential with Strong Hip Flexors: Don't Let Mobility Limit Your High Steps
exercises.description: Targeted hip mobility and strength cueing for one of the most climbing-specific movement limitations.

exercises.name: Thoracic Spine Mobility
exercises.video_title: Thoracic Spine Mobility for Climbers
exercises.description: Short and focused thoracic mobility drill set for overhead movement quality and better rotation.

exercises.name: Wrist Mobility and Stretching
exercises.video_title: Dynamic Climbing Wrist Stretch
exercises.description: Excellent quick wrist prep sequence that is practical before climbing or fingerboard sessions.

exercises.name: Finger Care and Stretching
exercises.video_title: Finger Care For Climbers
exercises.description: Broader finger care resource with useful mobility and recovery elements for inclusion after high finger-load sessions.

exercises.name: Yoga for Climbers Cooldown
exercises.video_title: 8 Minute Yoga Routine - For Climbing, Warm Ups and Cool Downs
exercises.description: Nicely packaged short yoga flow that works as either mobility work or cooldown inside the app.

exercises.name: Climbing Warm-Up Routine
exercises.video_title: Climbing Warm Up (Super Quick)
exercises.description: Strong climbing-specific warm-up flow with enough structure to turn into a guided pre-session routine.

exercises.name: General Warm-Up for Climbing
exercises.video_title: 8 MIN GENERAL WARMUP FOR CLIMBING
exercises.description: Easy general prep option for home or gym use before climbing, strength, or board sessions.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Warm-Up
exercises.video_title: The Climbing Doc l Episode 27- Rubber Band Exercises for Climbers!
exercises.description: Band-based shoulder activation and prehab drills that fit perfectly into warm-up or recovery sessions.
